ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "pub_date" TEXT /* Publication date */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication venue */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication type */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "pdf_link" TEXT /* Link to the PDF version of the publication */,
  "arxiv_link" TEXT /* Link to the arXiv version of the publication */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) of the publication */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number (ISBN) of the publication */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the publication */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume number of the publication */,
  "issue" INTEGER /* Issue number of the publication */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page numbers of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES publication_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the author's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authorships" (
  "authorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each authorship */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the publication (e.g., lead author, co-author) */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the publication (e.g., first author, second author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("authorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authorships_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authorships_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being cited */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date of the citation */,
  "citing_pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication that cited the original publication */,
  "citation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the citation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_citing_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("citing_pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_citation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("citation_type_id") REFERENCES citation_types ("citation_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citation_counts" (
  "citation_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation count */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Current citation count of the publication */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the citation count was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citation_counts_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_citations" (
  "external_citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external citation */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the external citation data (e.g., Google Scholar, Scopus) */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Citation count of the publication according to the external source */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the external citation data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_citations_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., faculty, postdoc, student) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the researcher's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_publications" (
  "researcher_pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher publication */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_publications_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_publications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first researcher */,
  "researcher2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second researcher */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication resulting from the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher2_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher2_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher1_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher1_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publication type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citation_types" (
  "citation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation type */,
  "citation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the citation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the citation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citation_networks" (
  "citation_network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation network */,
  "pub_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first publication */,
  "pub_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second publication */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the citation edge between the two publications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citation_networks_pub_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id1") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citation_networks_pub_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id2") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_factors" (
  "impact_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact factor */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the publication */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the impact factor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_factors_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "altmetrics" (
  "altmetric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each altmetric */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the altmetric data (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "altmetric" INTEGER /* Altmetric value of the publication */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the altmetric data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("altmetric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_altmetrics_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)
